parameters.jsCode:
const caption = $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim() || null;
return [{ json: { image_caption: caption } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, id: $('Save to Supabase').first().json.id, title: $('Save to Supabase').first().json.title } }}

parameters.content:
## Vision Branch (Manual Photos Only)

After upload, check if this was a manual photo (not OG).
If yes → send to GPT-4o Vision (detail:low, fast + cheap ~$0.001)
Get image_caption → merge into AI Enhance prompt.

OG images skipped — their title/description already covers content.

image_caption improves:
- enriched_description (visual + atmospheric detail)
- keywords (detected objects, style, cuisine type)
- embedding quality (visual semantics in vector space)

## Auto-Save on Add
After item is created in knowledge_items, immediately insert an endorsement row for the creator.

Every discovery starts with save count = 1.
Visibility mirrors the item's own visibility setting.

## Manual Photo Upload Path
User uploaded a photo directly from their device.
Photo is already compressed by the browser before sending (canvas resize, max 1200px, JPEG 82%).
n8n just converts base64 → binary → uploads to Supabase Storage.
Base64 also retained for Vision call.
